zh.lifeSummary: 當John Arthur Burton of Hadlow於1505年出生在英國肯特哈德洛福時，他的父親Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor32歲，母親Elizabeth Poyner20歲。他於1528年與Agnes Mary Holte在英國肯特哈德洛福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年7月28日在英國英格蘭肯特哈德洛福享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特哈德洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Arthur Burton of Hadlow于1505年出生在英国肯特哈德洛福时，他的父亲Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor32岁，母亲Elizabeth Poyner20岁。他于1528年与Agnes Mary Holte在英国肯特哈德洛福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年7月28日在英国英格兰肯特哈德洛福享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特哈德洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Arthur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin. King Arthur was a British king of the 5th or 6th century, about whom virtually no historical facts are known. He ruled in Britain after the collapse of the Roman Empire and before the coming of the Germanic tribes, and a vast body of legends grew up around him in the literatures of medieval Western Europe. His name is first found in the Latinized form Artorius; it is of obscure etymology. The spelling with -th- was popular among the gentry families of West Yorkshire in the late 1400s, even before Henry VII , who may have hoped to capitalize on the legend, gave the name to his son. It remained in regular use in some areas and its popularity exploded in the early 19th century, largely as a result of the fame of Arthur Wellesley ( 1769–1852 ), Duke of Wellington, the victor at the Battle of Waterloo and subsequently prime minister. Further influences were Tennyson's Idylls of the King ( 1859–85 ), and the widespread Victorian interest, especially among the Pre-Raphaelites, in things medieval in general and in Arthurian legend in particular.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Arthur Burton of Hadlow was born in 1505, in Hadlow, Kent, England, his father, Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Poyner, was 20. He married Agnes Mary Holte in 1528, in Hadlow, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 28 July 1557, in Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Barton St. David, Somerset, England: Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Arthur Burton of Hadlow est né en 1505, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Poyner, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Mary Holte en 1528, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1557, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Arthur Burton of Hadlowが1505年にイギリスケントハドロウで生まれた時，父Sir Knight John Burton of Longnorは32歳，母Elizabeth Poynerは20歳であった。1528年にイギリスケントハドロウでAgnes Mary Holteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年7月28日にイギリスイギリスケントハドロウで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントハドロウにて埋葬された。

ko.Barton St. David, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드
ko.lifeSummary: John Arthur Burton of Hadlow(이)가 1505년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Poyner(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1528년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 Agnes Mary Holte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 7월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하들로에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 하들로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Arthur Burton of Hadlow nasceu em 1505, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Poyner, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Mary Holte em 1528, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1557, em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Barton St. David, Somerset, England: бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Arthur Burton of Hadlow родился в 1505 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Poyner, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Mary Holte в 1528 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 28 июля 1557 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Arthur Burton of Hadlow nació en 1505, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Poyner, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes Mary Holte en 1528, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de julio de 1557, en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Hadlow, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
